title: ctenopteris moniliformis
intro: Ctenopteris moniliformis, also known as the thread fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris moniliformis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Ctenopteris moniliformis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
